errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.

login.subtitle: Access to the operations panel
login.cardDescription: Username and password defined in your `.env` file (`AUTH_USERS_JSON`).

auth.viewerBanner: Read-only session (viewer): you can browse, print, and export reports; you cannot create or change records.
auth.demoBannerDesc: Browse home, operations, PT stock, orders, dispatches, and reports; download PDFs and print labels. Create and edit actions are hidden.

about.pageSubtitle: Pinebloom Packing — operational panel for plant, packaging, process, dispatch and reports.

practices.title: Best practices
practices.tip1: Use appropriate roles (viewer, operator, supervisor, admin) and do not share credentials.
practices.tip2: In production: bcrypt hashed passwords, strong JWT and HTTPS.
practices.tip3: Login has a per-minute attempt limit to reduce abuse.

plant.pageSubtitle: Read access for all roles; save for administrators only.

card.title: Settings
card.readOnlyHint: Log in as admin to edit these values.

consumptions.pageSubtitle: Operational consumption by format and category for quick replenishment decisions.

sections.title: Consumption by material
sections.zeroCostWarning: Material cost shows $0 because recipes have no unit cost configured in materials. Set costs in Materials to see real cost per format.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: Your user does not have permission for this action or route. If you think this is an error, contact an administrator.

dashboard.title: Operations hub
dashboard.subtitle: Intake, processing, output, commercial risk and capacity in one view.

noAuth.title: No data until you sign in.
noAuth.desc: Metrics are loaded from the server with your active token.

loadError.title: Some lists could not be loaded.
loadError.desc: Try again later or check your connection; KPIs may be incomplete.
loadError.demoTitle: Some commercial data is not available for this session.
loadError.demoDesc: The rest of the dashboard is still useful for the demo. If permissions were just updated, sign out and sign in again.

kpi.loginRequired: Metrics and charts require an active session.
kpi.packedDesc: Net packout recorded in PT tags.
kpi.dispatchedDesc: Physical exit via invoice lb or tag estimate.

gauges.title: Pending orders progress
gauges.hintWithBalance: Up to 5 orders with balance. Camera: cooler reserve, BOL in stock or boxes in order packing list. Physical exit: Yes/No based on complete dispatch.
gauges.hintNoBalance: No orders with balance: showing last 5 shipped orders.
gauges.loginRequired: Sign in to see commercial progress.
gauges.cameraDesc: Cooler, stock (BOL) or order packing list
gauges.depotReserved: Reserved in camera: {{boxes}} boxes — PL pending.
gauges.cameraReady: Camera ready for order: continue with PL and dispatch.
gauges.plReady: Ready in PL: pending exit / dispatch.

tripaje.title: Shared lashing resources
tripaje.hint: Available for all orders · minimum 1 cont = 24 pallets

capacity.title: Capacity by format
capacity.hint: Bottleneck = minimum between boxes, clamshell and labels per client.
capacity.noClients: No clients required for this format in active orders.

chart.title: Received vs packed (lb)
chart.hint: Same filters as above (period, producer, species, mode). Compare fruit intake vs PT packout.

production.title: Production by client
production.hint: Bars relative to produced (100% reference). Camera estimated as produced − dispatched for this view.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.materialCriticalDesc: Low stock on key packaging materials.
alerts.orderRiskDesc: Load date near or high pending pallets.
alerts.tripajeCriticalDesc: Resources with less than 1 possible container.
alerts.okDesc: No major blockers with current filters.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.hint: Last events in the filtered period.

eod.title: End of day
eod.subtitle: Close by client and format · copy to email
eod.toastSuccess: End of day summary copied (HTML + text)

planning.title: Daily planning
planning.hintFinFirst: End of day above on this screen.
planning.hintFinEnd: End of day at the bottom of OPERATIONS.
planning.shippedDesc: Day exit (confirmed + dispatch date or dispatched)
planning.shippedNone: No exit recorded for this date
planning.mpNone: No fruit available for distribution (confirmed/closed with balance)
planning.mpDetail: {{producers}} producer(s) · {{lines}} line(s) with balance · reception − turned

email.title: END OF DAY – PT UNIT
email.noMovement: No movement by client for the indicated date.
email.noBoxes: No boxes by format for this client on this date.

reception.pageSubtitle: Raw material intake to plant: weights, lots and traceability to processing.

dialog.adminNotice: Admin mode: you can only change the document state. Everything else is locked. «Voided» follows the same flow as always (e.g. not allowed if there are processes with MP from this reception).
dialog.fieldReferenceHint: Same reference can appear in another reception (e.g. hand/machine). Line lot includes the reception id. > in CSV optional; saved in uppercase.
dialog.linesHint: Species, variety, weights and container per row.
dialog.confirmNotice: Confirmed document: you can close it to make it permanently read-only.

alerts.title: Operational signals
alerts.noLines: {{count}} reception(s) with no lines in view — check load or filters.
alerts.netZero: {{count}} reception(s) with lines but net lb don't add up — check weights.
alerts.noProducer: {{count}} reception(s) with no producer name in master.

table.title: Operational history
table.hint: {{count}} record(s) · net lb: sum of lines; if all give 0, header net is shown (net_weight_lb).
table.empty: No receptions match the current filter.

analysis.title: Volume analysis
analysis.hint: Derived from current filter · average {{avg}} lb per reception

dialog.title: New process
dialog.noMpWarning: No producer has fruit with balance in reception (not voided). Check that the reception has lines with lb, is not voided and the producer matches.
dialog.noLinesWarning: No lines with available balance for this producer.
dialog.mpSectionHint: Enter how many lb to take from each line (up to available balance). The sum defines the input lb. Order: oldest receptions first. Only receptions in draft state are listed.
dialog.machineHint: Configure machines in Masters → Process lines.
dialog.speciesHint: Enter lb in at least one line with balance to determine species and load result components.
dialog.noComponents: No active components for this species in masters.
dialog.componentsHint: Components appear when there is allocation in lines and the species is determined.
dialog.calcNewNotice: On creation there are no PT units yet: packout = 0. If you enter components, they must sum to the input lb.

editDialog.entradaEditHint: Use decimal point (e.g. 5.868). The cap includes what is already allocated to this process.
editDialog.noMpLines: No lines with balance to adjust the input.
editDialog.mpAllocSum: Allocation sum: {{value}} lb · save with «Save changes».
editDialog.noPt: No PT unit references this process.
editDialog.multiUnlinkDesc: Use Unlink / Open per row or Unlink all above (goes through draft on server).
editDialog.recoveryIntro: If you unlinked by mistake, the system searches final pallets and tags from the same producer (±21 days).
editDialog.recoveryEmpty: No automatic hints. Try PT Unit filtered by producer and process date, or a Railway backup.
editDialog.statusBorradorWarning: Draft with PT #{{id}} still linked: Apply status unlinks on server.
editDialog.statusReopenKeepsPt: Applying «draft» reopens the process for editing and keeps {{count}} PT unit(s) ({{boxes}} boxes).
editDialog.statusUnlinkHint: To remove PT links use «Unlink» (not «Apply status» to draft).
editDialog.statusUnlinkConfirm: This will remove links between this process and {{count}} PT unit(s) ({{boxes}} boxes). PT units may remain in inventory but will no longer count toward this process. Continue?
editDialog.statusHelpDesc: Confirmed requires balance (input = packout + components). Reopening to draft only changes status (does not unlink PT). Unlink removes PT items from the process.
editDialog.adminEditWarning: Admin: editing with closed process; balance of lb still applies.
editDialog.fieldEntradaManualHint: No reception lines linked; edit input manually if applicable.
editDialog.pendingError: Pending not zero: adjust components, waste, input (pencil on Input card) or PT/pallets until balanced.
editDialog.mermaComponentNote: With lb in the WASTE component list, edit the value there.

search.placeholder: Search by producer, variety, lot or ID (also ID filter above)

table.title: Processes
table.empty: No processes match the current filter.

toast.checkLb: Check the lb entered per line.
toast.lineOverflow: Line R{{id}}: cannot empty more than the balance ({{lb}} lb).
toast.noLines: Enter lb to empty in at least one line with balance.
toast.balanceError: Input lb must equal components (on creation packout from PT units is 0). Or clear the components.
toast.checkAllocLb: Check allocation lb (use decimal point, e.g. 5.868).
toast.noAllocLines: Enter at least one reception line with lb in the MP allocation.

salesOrder.pageSubtitle: Commercial planning by format; track fulfillment in Progress and dispatch.

dialog.clientEmpty: No clients in the master (or all inactive without including inactive). Add at least one client in Masters before creating the order.
dialog.orderNumberHint: If left empty, the system auto-generates SO-#####.
dialog.editOrderNumberHint: You can use the BOL or another key to cross-reference with documents. Must be unique (no duplicates).

alerts.title: Operational signals
alerts.vacios: {{count}} order(s) with no boxes and not canceled — check lines or mark «Canceled» in commercial state.
alerts.cancelados: {{count}} canceled order(s) in view (boxes at 0, record kept).
alerts.sinCliente: {{count}} order(s) with no client name in master (ID only).
alerts.sinLineas: {{count}} order(s) with no lines in current view.
alerts.multiformato: {{count}} order(s) combine more than one format — progress crosses by format/brand/variety.

segments.label: View
segments.hint: Pending: with boxes and balance to dispatch. Completed: dispatch matched by order or BOL (= order no.) or no shortfall. Canceled: canceled/voided state. No boxes: volume 0 not canceled.

table.title: Commercial list
table.hint: {{count}} order(s) in view «{{segment}}» · PL/dispatch detail in Progress
table.emptyFilter: No matches for the current filter.

scopeNote.title: Scope note
scopeNote.desc: Order reference (default SO-#####); you can change it when editing (e.g. BOL). Dispatch/PL states and consolidated weight appear in the progress view and in Dispatches / Packing Lists modules.

toast.updated: Order updated (packing/invoice regenerated in linked dispatches)

card.title: By order line
card.description: Depot = final pallets in definitive state without PL or dispatch (same format/brand/variety as the line). Reserved order = subset of depot with «planned order» = this order in PT Stock. Assigned PL = in confirmed PT packing list (not reversed) linked to the order by dispatch or by pallet with planned order. Dispatched = same criteria with confirmed or dispatched dispatch.
card.emptyLines: This order has no lines loaded. Edit the order to add lines by format.

ptTag.pageSubtitle: Tags, format and link to the fruit process.

dialog.multiProcessWarning: Multiple process lines: not editable here.
dialog.noProcesses: No available processes (draft/confirmed with lb for PT).
dialog.marginOk: Margin available · You can go up to {{max}} boxes
dialog.bulkUnitsHint: Creates N tags with the same data
dialog.destinationWarning: It is recommended to assign a commercial destination (client, BOL or reference) for traceability.

panels.title: More operational panels
panels.eodHint: Selected date ({{date}}). Formats unified with masters; line: quantity · format.
panels.projectionEst: ~{{count}} boxes (est. lb ÷ avg net active formats)
panels.globalUnassigned: Global: {{count}} unit{{suffix}} without planned client in the whole system.

table.title: PT Units
table.empty: No results. Create a unit or adjust filters.

delete.title: Delete PT unit
delete.description: Deletes the tag, its linked process items in this unit, associated packaging consumptions and draft final pallets. Not allowed if the unit is in a dispatch, invoice, merge, or if a final pallet is already in a packing list or dispatched: in those cases the system will show the reason.

print.title: PT label printing
print.showAll: Show all printers on this device
print.noZebraFallback: No Zebra printer on this device.
print.rememberPrinter: Remember this printer on this device
print.serviceUnavailableDesc: Start the print service on this PC or use «Download ZPL» to print manually.
print.copiesHint: Default 1 copy per label sent to the local service.

commercialBadge.noneTitle: This unit has no commercial destination defined yet (planned client).
commercialBadge.partialTitle: Planned client loaded; complete brand or BOL/reference to close the operational assignment.
commercialBadge.fullTitle: Commercial destination set: client and brand or BOL/reference.

toast.createdBulk: {{count}} PT units created and linked to process
toast.created: PT unit created and linked to process
toast.printServiceUnavailable: Zebra local print service not detected on this device.
toast.noPreviousPrint: No previous print registered in this browser.
toast.tagNotFound: Last tag not found in the loaded list; find it and reprint from the row.
toast.destinationWarning: It is recommended to assign a commercial destination (client, BOL or reference) for traceability.

existenciasPt.pageSubtitle: PT stock in camera, BOL, dispatch and packing lists.

filters.title: Filters
filters.bolHint: Only BOLs present in this batch.
filters.depositOnly: Available in depot only (definitive and no dispatch)

table.title: Camera inventory
table.criteriaRepalletDesc: unit generated or modified by repallet
table.empty: No PT Units match the current filters.
table.emptyBol: No pallets with the selected BOL in this batch (max. 500). Choose All in BOL or expand filters.
table.viewPtUnits: View PT units linked via process

unitsDialog.title: PT Units · {{code}}
unitsDialog.hint: Tags linked via process (same chain as pallet detail).
unitsDialog.moreContextDesc: Tags linked via process from the logistics record lines (same chain as the detail traceability). The stock shown in the main table is the camera / PT stock.
unitsDialog.loadError: Could not load traceability for this record.
unitsDialog.emptyDesc: This stock may exist without visible PT unit list: lines without process with tag, or model loaded before full traceability. Total boxes/lb remain valid for operations.
unitsDialog.unitBoxes: {{count}} boxes in the PT unit (global tag stock)

bolDialog.title: Assign BOL
bolDialog.description: Same BOL for {{count}} selected record(s), definitive state without dispatch only.
bolDialog.scopeDesc: The same BOL will be applied to the selected records. Only applies to PT Unit in definitive state without dispatch; you can correct it later from the detail or the usual logistics flow.

toast.bolAssigned: BOL assigned to {{count}} PT Unit record(s).

repallet.pageSubtitle: Reorganize boxes between PT pallets in depot and generate a result pallet with traceability.
repallet.helpBody: Take boxes from one or more pallets in depot (definitive, no dispatch) and form a new pallet. The main restriction is that they share format (and the rest of the header: client, species, operational quality, packing, market, brand). You can mix varieties in the destination; each process/variety/ref combination stays in its own line. Records the event for traceability.
repallet.newRepalletInfo: Origins (FIFO by lines). Filters (incl. Completeness: incomplete only vs cap) and the table use the same universe (depot only). Boxes to move cannot exceed what is available per pallet.

form.title: New repallet
form.formatHint: Repallet within the same format: choosing one aligns the list and table. Pallets with fewer boxes than the format cap appear as partial below.
form.partialTitle: Fewer boxes than the format cap in master

table.title: Stock in camera (quick view)
table.emptyAll: No pallets in depot to repallet.
table.emptyPartial: No incomplete pallets (vs format cap) with current filters.
table.emptyFilter: No matches for the current filter.
table.colBoxesTitle: Current boxes / format cap in master
table.colBoxesNoLimit: No cap defined for this format
table.partialBadgeTitle: Fewer boxes than the format cap (partial pallet)

alerts.title: Operational signals
alerts.sinCajas: {{count}} pallet(s) with 0 boxes in view — check consistency before moving stock.
alerts.conDespacho: {{count}} record(s) show dispatch link; the list follows the server "depot only" filter.
alerts.traza: In view: {{origins}} origin(s) and {{results}} result(s) of repallet for traceability.
alerts.parciales: {{count}} pallet(s) with fewer boxes than the format cap (in the universe before "incomplete only"). Use the Completeness filter to narrow the table and origin selectors.

ptPackingLists.pageSubtitle: Commercial preparation, BOL and PT stock before dispatch.
ptPackingLists.helpTitle: Logistics lists independent of dispatch and invoice. Create from camera inventory (PT Stock). Flow: draft → confirmed (deducts PT stock). Reversal only if no pallet is in dispatch. Order and dispatch are linked when the PL is included in a dispatch.

table.title: Operational list
table.hintCompact: {{count}} record(s) · compact by client and progress
table.hintDetailed: {{count}} record(s) · full table with commercial condition
table.criteriaInProgressDesc: Packing List in draft or preparation
table.warningNoPalletsDesc: Created by bulk import without linked PT Units. Go to each PL detail to assign the corresponding pallets.
table.emptyAll: No packing lists. Create one from camera inventory.
table.emptyFilter: No matches for the current filter.
table.manyResults: Many results: use filters or open the detail to see formats

bottomAlerts.noClient: {{count}} PL without commercial client (not voided). Check in detail or inventory.
bottomAlerts.emptyDrafts: {{count}} draft without pallets — complete from inventory or delete if not applicable.
bottomAlerts.emptyDraftsPlural: {{count}} drafts without pallets — complete from inventory or delete if not applicable.

ptPackingListDetail.sectionSubtitle: Commercial and logistics tracking of the selected list.
ptPackingListDetail.confirmDialog: Confirm packing list? PT stock will be deducted and pallets will be set to assigned to packing list.
ptPackingListDetail.noPalletsWarning: This packing list has no PT Units assigned. Boxes show 0 because it was created by bulk import.

invoice.title: Commercial invoice — prices by format
invoice.desc: Price per box by format. Suggested from order {{order}} (same commercial client or order from linked dispatch). Empty or invalid = 0. Does not modify stock.
invoice.noFormats: No formats with ID in this list's pallets; the invoice will use 0 amounts unless data is loaded via API.

reverse.title: Revert packing list
reverse.desc: Pallets return to definitive state in depot and PT stock is restored.
reverse.linkedDispatch: This list is linked to dispatch #{{id}}.
reverse.adminCanReverse: As supervisor or administrator you can use the master revert: unlinks the dispatch (and deletes it if it was the only packing list) and then applies the reversal. If the dispatch is «dispatched», first undo the exit in Dispatches.
reverse.needAdmin: Ask a supervisor or administrator to use «Revert (admin)» here, or manually unlink from Dispatches before reverting.
reverse.noDispatch: Cannot revert if any pallet already has another dispatch assigned by another path.
reverse.notesPlaceholder: Reason or observation for the reversal
reverse.adminConfirm: Revert with dispatch unlink? The dispatch link will be removed (and the dispatch deleted if it was empty). Pallets will return to depot.
reverse.notAvailableTitle: Only an administrator can revert with a linked dispatch

client.title: Commercial client
client.descVoided: Packing list voided; client cannot be edited.
client.descLinked: Saving updates the PL, all list pallets and the linked dispatch client (if not dispatched).
client.descFree: Reassign the buyer when the fruit is redirected (e.g. quality rejection and sale to another client).
client.label: Client
client.confirmChange: Change the client of this packing list and all its pallets? PT stock is recalculated by client.

bol.title: BOL (document)
bol.descLinked: Managed from dispatch #{{id}}. Change the BOL in Dispatches (BOL button: dispatch only or also in PL).
bol.descVoided: Packing list voided; BOL cannot be edited.
bol.descFree: Set the BOL before creating the dispatch to inherit it automatically.
bol.label: BOL number

pallets.title: Pallets
pallets.emptyDesc: This PL was created by bulk import without linked PT Units.

toast.clientUpdated: Client updated in the packing list and its pallets.
toast.confirmed: Packing list confirmed: PT stock deducted and pallets set to "assigned_pl".
toast.reversed: Reversal applied: pallets set to definitive and PT stock restored.
toast.reversedMaster: Reversal applied: dispatch unlinked or deleted, pallets set to definitive and PT stock restored.

dispatch.pageSubtitle: Exits, BOL, packing list and invoice — tracking by status and client.
dispatch.helpTitle: Flow closing: Process → PT Unit → PT Stock → Dispatch. Logistics and documentary view. If Boxes shows "—", the origin does not contribute boxes in items. States: draft → confirmed → dispatched. PT stock moves when confirming packing lists in PT Stock, not when confirming the dispatch. Invoice: ① Prices → ② Invoice → ③ PDF.

dialog.title: New dispatch
dialog.plEmpty: No confirmed free packing lists. Confirm them in PT Stock (packing lists) first.
dialog.orderSelectPl: Select packing lists with the same client
dialog.orderNone: No pending orders for this client
dialog.orderHint: Pending orders only for this client (boxes to dispatch), sorted by order number.
dialog.orderWarnClient: PLs must have the same commercial client loaded in PT Stock to filter orders.
dialog.orderChoosePl: First choose one or more PT packing lists.
dialog.bolConflict: Selected PLs have different BOLs. Unify in each packing list or select PLs with the same BOL.
dialog.bolInherited: {{bol}} from the packing list will be used if you leave the field empty or the same. If you change the value, it will only apply to the dispatch (does not modify PLs).
dialog.bolNone: No selected PL has a BOL; enter it here.
dialog.clientConflictWarn: Selected packing lists have different commercial clients in inventory (PT Stock). In advanced options you can set one or leave unset (by PT unit).
dialog.advancedHint: Only if you need to align billing/PT stock with a master client different from the automatic flow.
dialog.advancedSuggested: Suggested value from selected packing lists (same client in all PLs).

kpi.withAlertsNote: Client, BOL or pallets — expand row

dispatch.alertBanner: {{count}} dispatch{{suffix}} with warnings in this view. Check the status column or expand the detail.

table.title: Operational list
table.hintDetailed: {{count}} record(s) · expand a row for documents and lines
table.emptyAll: No dispatches. Create orders and then a dispatch.
table.emptyFilter: No matches for the current filter.
table.attachPtHint: Definitive state units only, without another dispatch. Updates the packing list. Commercial invoice uses price per box by presentation format (enter below for marked stocks).
table.markPalletsHint: Mark pallets with format to enter prices per box.
table.confirmWarningDesc: Check pallets and commercial data before closing. If the shipment is correct despite these signals, you can still confirm.
table.bolApplyToPl: Also update the BOL in the PT packing lists linked to this dispatch
table.bolOnlyDispatch: If unchecked, the change applies only to the dispatch; packing lists keep their BOL (dispatch only).
table.metaPostDispatch: Post-exit adjustment: an automatic trace is saved in thermograph notes.
table.shipToAddressPlaceholder: E.g. 6325 N Powhatan Rd, Aurora CO
table.orderLinkPostDispatch: Post-exit correction: automatic trace is kept in operational notes.
table.pricesDesc: Dispatch #{{id}}. Prices per box: filled from order #{{orderId}} if you haven't saved values in the dispatch yet; you can correct them. Then ② Invoice and ③ PDF. Empty is saved as 0; does not modify PT stock.
table.pricesLocked: This dispatch is dispatched (physical exit recorded). Invoice prices cannot be edited.
table.noFormats: No formats with ID in this dispatch's pallets.
table.manualInvHint: For exceptions only. The main commercial detail still comes from ① prices by format and ② generate invoice.
table.noPtInPl: No units in linked packing lists.
table.noTagLines: No PT unit lines in this dispatch.
table.draftNoticeDesc: you can edit BOL and data; the main action is
table.confirmedNotice: Confirmed: document closed; next step «Register physical exit»

toast.reverted: Physical exit undone — dispatch returned to «confirmed»
toast.pricesSaved: ① Prices saved. Run ② Invoice and then ③ PDF if not done yet.
toast.pricesAndInvoice: Prices saved and ② Invoice generated. Download with ③ PDF.
toast.invoiceReady: ② Invoice ready. Download the PDF with ③ PDF.
toast.errNoPl: Select at least one confirmed PT packing list.
toast.errPlConflict: Selected packing lists have different commercial clients. Unify clients in PLs (PT Stock) or adjust selection.
toast.errNoClient: Selected packing lists have no commercial client loaded. Assign it in PT Stock to list pending orders for that client.
toast.errOrderLoading: Loading orders… wait a moment and try again.
toast.errNoOrders: No pending dispatch orders for this client's packing lists.
toast.errInvalidOrder: Choose a valid order from the list.
toast.errBolConflict: Selected packing lists have different BOLs. Unify BOL in each PL (PT Stock) or select PLs with the same BOL.
toast.errNoBol: Enter BOL number or set it in the packing lists PT first.
toast.confirmRevertSalida: Undo the physical exit record? The dispatch will return to «confirmed». PT stock is not modified.

masters.pageSubtitle: Support catalogs — quick add and edit.
masters.readOnlyDesc: You need supervisor or admin role to edit.
masters.viewerBrowseDesc: You can browse all catalogs; editing is disabled for your role.

action.confirmDelete: Delete this record? This action cannot be undone.

materials.pageSubtitle: Operational stock management, adjustments and cost traceability.

quickDialog.title: Quick material
quickDialog.hint: Default unit «unit», cost 0 and stock 0. Adjust in the table afterwards.

addDialog.title: New material
addDialog.description: Add to master with scope and unit. Stock starts at 0: load initial inventory or purchases from «Inventory adjustment».
addDialog.tip1: Without formats or clients checked, the material applies to all operations.
addDialog.tip2: Check formats or clients only when consumption differs (labels by client, clamshell by format, etc.).
addDialog.tip3: stays at 0 until you register movements; the master cost can be edited in the grid; it helps that the unit (unit, lb, ml, kg) matches how you buy and consume in recipes.
addDialog.formatHint: Empty = all formats. With selection = only those codes.
addDialog.clientHint: Empty = all clients. Useful for dedicated materials by account.
addDialog.costLabel: Unit cost (reference at creation; editable later in each material)
addDialog.costHint: Initial inventory and purchases start at 0 when creating the material. Register them with the «Movement / kardex» button or from the Kardex screen.

kardexDialog.title: Inventory adjustment
kardexDialog.description: Modifies current stock and records the movement in Kardex.
kardexDialog.detailDesc: Choose the material and movement type. Purchases require a linked supplier; exits and corrections require a clear reason. Initial inventory is only for the first historical load. Everything is traced in Kardex with date and reference.
kardexDialog.selectHint: Select a material in the left column to load adjustment type and movement data.
kardexDialog.typePurchaseHint: Entry with supplier, PO/invoice and cost.

summary.title: Inventory summary
summary.description: Operational view of stock and master cost for active materials.

inventory.title: Inventory grouped by category
inventory.description: Active materials with quick view for daily operations and master cost.

linkDialog.title: Supplier and guide text
linkDialog.description: Link packaging suppliers and the code or name that appears on delivery notes. Any operator can edit those texts; adding new links: supervisor/admin.

deleteDialog.title: Delete material
deleteDialog.description: Removed from inventory and kardex movements are deleted. If it fails, it's usually: an active recipe that still lists it, or cost history by tag (breakdown of already loaded packaging), different from the current recipe.

toast.createdQuick: Material created · complete cost in the table

kardex.pageSubtitle: Initial inventory, purchases and PT Unit consumption by material.

filters.loadError: Could not load movements. Check connection or try again; the operational summary may not show until the history responds.

summary.title: Material summary
summary.hint: Operational stock view from server (not affected by dates or type filter below).
summary.otherNetNote: Entries and exits outside typical purchases/PT consumption.
summary.totalEntriesNote: Operational base loaded before PT consumption.
summary.ptConsumptionNote: Sum of all PT unit boxes × recipe factor (same logic as Consumptions).
summary.includesMov: Includes {{count}} mov. without PT consumption in the model.

byFormat.title: Consumption by format
byFormat.description: Committed from all PT units created and each format's recipe (includes materials shared across formats). Recorded = tags with posted consumption only.
byFormat.empty: This material is not in active recipes with PT units in the plant, or is outside the material scope.

truncated.title: Truncated history
truncated.desc: Showing last 5000 movements for this material. If you don't see an old movement, expand dates or check reports outside this screen.

movements.title: Movements
movements.descEmpty: Choose a material to see dates, quantities, reference and balance after each movement.
movements.descLoaded: Order: most recent first. Filters only hide rows; balance after follows the full loaded history.
movements.hint: Green = entry, red = exit. Balance after: red if cumulative balance in that row is ≤ 0.
movements.colBalanceTitle: Cumulative balance after this movement (full loaded history)

existenciaDetail.confirmRevert: Revert this repallet? The preparation will be set to reverted state and origins will recover their boxes. This action is logged.
existenciaDetail.noTar: : no PT unit (TAR) resolvable from the lines in the current database.
existenciaDetail.repalletResult: Yes — result (active stock in this preparation)
existenciaDetail.repalletOrigin: Yes — origin consumed (do not duplicate lb/boxes)

repallet.title: Repallet
repallet.description: Links between stocks when this preparation comes from a repallet or contributed boxes to another destination.
repallet.isResult: This stock is the result of a repallet
repallet.isSource: This stock contributed boxes to other preparations

lines.title: Lines and chain reception → process → PT Unit

bulkImport.pageSubtitle: Import historical data from your previous system. Download the template, fill it in and upload it.
bulkImport.warningSteps:
1. Download the full backup (button above)
2. Save it in a safe place
3. Verify the ZIP contains all files
4. Only then proceed with cleanup

labels.templateHint: Template with real system columns + valid code catalogs at the bottom.
labels.templateFill: Fill in with your historical data and save as CSV UTF-8.
labels.dragDrop: Drag your CSV here or click to select
labels.uploadPreview: Upload a file to see preview.
labels.receptionDesc: To remove them from Receptions, they must be deleted from the database and the list refreshed. Only receptions in draft state without linked processes can be deleted.
labels.processDesc: To remove processes loaded by CSV (or others in draft), select rows in the table and confirm. Only applies if the process is in draft, without closed balance, linked PT tag, PT stock line, invoice or repallet.
labels.ptTagDesc: Same as receptions: select tags in the table and confirm deletion. Only units without dispatch, without invoice lines and without participating in a merge can be deleted.
labels.salesOrderDesc: To remove them from Orders, they must be deleted from the database and the list refreshed. Only orders without any linked dispatch can be deleted.

dialogs.deleteReceptionsDesc: {{count}} reception(s) and their lines will be deleted from the database. Cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteSalesOrdersDesc: {{count}} order(s) and their lines will be deleted from the database. Cannot be undone. Only applies to orders without dispatch.
dialogs.deletePtTagsDesc: {{count}} PT unit(s) will be deleted from the database. Cannot be undone. Does not apply to tags with dispatch, invoice or merge.
dialogs.deleteProcessesDesc: {{count}} process(es), their reception line assignments and MP movements will be deleted. Cannot be undone.

toast.deletedSalesOrders: Deleted {{orders}} order(s), {{lines}} line(s), {{pallets}} PT plan link(s), {{mods}} history record(s)
toast.receptionsDraftLimit: Only {{count}} draft reception(s) in this view (you requested {{n}}).
toast.salesOrdersLimit: Only {{count}} order(s) without dispatch in this view (you requested {{n}}).
toast.ptTagsLimit: Only {{count}} deletable PT unit(s) in this view (you requested {{n}}). Others have dispatch, invoice or merge.
toast.processesLimit: Only {{count}} deletable process(es) in this view (you requested {{n}}). Check state, balance, tags or PT stocks.

reporting.title: Reports
reporting.subtitle: Operations and Decision use the operative date — Close and Documents use the settlement period.

operacion.label: Operations
operacion.subtitle: What happened today? End of day first; shift KPIs; period at the end.
operacion.excelHint: In Documents you can export the full workbook with the same filters.

decision.label: Decision
decision.subtitle: What should I produce? RM context and simulation — no financial report filters; settlement from Close.
decision.excelHint: In Documents you can export the full workbook with the same filters.

cierre.label: Close
cierre.subtitle: How much did each producer earn? Settlement, packing by species and traceability.
cierre.excelHint: Export ALL (Excel) and PDF from the Documents tab.

documentos.label: Documents
documentos.subtitle: Mass balance by producer and unified Excel.
documentos.excelHint: Pick dates and download Excel per producer or all.

operacion.kpisHint: Daily KPIs (packed, cold-storage, shipped and RM in process) just below the end-of-day for the operative date.

documentos.title: Documents
documentos.subtitle: How do I export? See the period summary and download the workbook or PDFs with the same filters.
documentos.beforeExportHint: click «Refresh data» above. Each file reflects the last period you generated with those filters.
documentos.periodViewHint: Always shows real data from the last generate (not empty once loaded).
documentos.noData: No generate in memory yet. Click Refresh data and come back: totals and the sample table will appear automatically.

cierre.packingRatesDesc: USD/lb per species · configure before close
cierre.packingRatesHelp: Packing service price in USD/lb per species. Applied to period volume. If using manual packing price in filters, that value takes priority.
cierre.surchargesDesc: Extra charge in USD/lb for specific formats. Added to the base packing rate per species in settlement.
cierre.viewProducerDesc: Individual report · PDF and Excel per producer
cierre.exportsDesc: Complete dataset for the generated period
cierre.clientAnalysisDesc: Margin and sales prorated by commercial client
cierre.formatAnalysisDesc: Material and packing cost by format code
cierre.includeZeroBoxes: Include formats with 0 boxes in period
cierre.allZeroBoxes: All rows have 0 boxes. Enable the option above to see zero-volume lines.
cierre.emptyCierre: This screen shows only financial settlement. Configure the period in Period filters (above) and click Refresh close.
cierre.noFormatRowsDesc: No formats with invoiced boxes > 0, or the filter left the view empty.
cierre.noFormatRowsHint: Check «Include formats with 0 boxes» or verify recipes and invoices.

cierreStatus.title: Close status
cierreStatus.neutral: Neutral — manual price; species rate not applied.
cierreStatus.ready: Ready — all used species have an active rate.
cierreStatus.missingImpact: Missing rate for {format} → packing per lb may show as $0.
cierreStatus.packingZeroHint: Check species rates or format/LB data in period; net may be inflated if packing was not applied.
cierreStatus.opDetailReady: Ready — all producers have detail lines.
cierreStatus.opDetailMissing: No operative detail in response. PDF may be incomplete.
cierreStatus.producerReportChoose: Choose a producer to issue an individual report.
cierreStatus.producerReportReady: Ready to export PDF / Excel with current data.

auditor.title: Settlement auditor
auditor.subtitle: Review costs, traceability and incomplete data before exporting reports.
auditor.packingOk: Packing calculated on all visible detail lines.
auditor.materialesOk: Materials other than $0 on all lines with boxes > 0 (per loaded detail).
auditor.trazabilidadOk: Full traceability within the scope of this page.
auditor.sinFaltantes: No critical issues detected in packing, materials or traceability (detail loaded).

periodo.title: Settlement period
periodo.filtros: Period filters (dates, pagination, producer, client, format…)

ajustes.title: Scenario adjustments — materials
ajustes.desc1: Additional cost per box, lb or % on materials. Active = applied to close.
ajustes.desc2: Internal PDF always shows real cost; producer PDF uses the active adjustment.

liquidacion.title: Final settlement
liquidacion.desc: Sales − materials (recipe) − packing ($/lb × lb) = net per producer. Use the settlement auditor above and this summary before exporting.
liquidacion.sinLiquidacion: No settlement for these filters (no invoice lines in period dispatches).
liquidacion.sinLiquidacionHint: Regenerate or increase the row limit.
liquidacion.kpiNetoHint: Sum of net per row (loaded page).
liquidacion.kpiCostoTotalHint: Sum over loaded rows; consistent with sales − net.
liquidacion.paginaActual: KPIs and table show current page only
liquidacion.tablaCompleta: Full table · dispatch and format detail (all columns)

colapsables.ventasDespachoDesc: Sales and costs cross-reference by dispatch in the period
colapsables.ventasDespachoSubtitle: Dispatch cross-reference with the same filtered period.

productor.selectDesc: Only producers present in this settlement

costoCalculo.title: How the cost is calculated
costoCalculo.materialesDesc: : from packaging recipes per format (system consumptions; not a manual amount per producer).
costoCalculo.packingTarifaDesc: rate $/lb for the species of the format
costoCalculo.packingManualNote: (this period uses a manual packing price filter, overriding the species master).
costoCalculo.formatoDesc: : lbs in period per box accumulate packing in USD — more lbs per box means higher packing cost for those boxes.
costoCalculo.packingCeroNote: · packing $/lb may be 0 if rate or species is missing for the format.
costoCalculo.sinFilaCosto: No format cost row with boxes > 0 on the loaded page.

paginacion.totalServidor: Server total: {total} rows · page {page} · {limit} per page
paginacion.hayOtrasPaginas: Data on other pages: set "Page" to 1 or increase "Limit" (max. 9999).
paginacion.mostrandoDeTotal: Showing {shown} of {total}. For a single full response, set Page 1 and Limit 100 in filters and regenerate.

liquidacionDetalle.title: Settlement — dispatch and format detail
liquidacionDetalle.desc: Full table · dispatch and format detail (all columns)

margenCliente.descResumen: Sales − total cost = net margin. Last columns: margin per box and per lb.
margenCliente.totalesDesc: Totals by client: margin = sales − total cost; last columns are margin per box and per lb.
margenCliente.descDetalle: By client and packaging_code; the note explains the period cost proration.

costoFormato.descResumen: Volume and costs per period invoicing · packaging recipes · packing price/lb by species.
costoFormato.sinFilasResumen: No rows for the applied filters (or all with 0 boxes if you hid them).
costoFormato.sinFilasDetalle: No visible rows for the applied filters (or all with 0 boxes if hidden).
costoFormato.financiero: Financial (period invoicing + recipes + packing by species via cost/box):
costoFormato.sinRecetas: No recipe lines for this format.

diagnostico.trazabilidadDesc: The system assigns each invoice line in a dispatch to a producer (or unassigned) based on how the fruit reaches the invoiced pallet. These labels appear in the backend technical detail and in internal PDF / admin tables.
diagnostico.regla1desc: when the line carries a tarja: producer comes from the PT items of that unit.
diagnostico.regla2desc: if the invoice declares a fruit process, the process producer is used.
diagnostico.regla3desc: pallets from mixing or re-palletizing: amounts may be prorated between producers by boxes of origin.
diagnostico.regla4desc: no PT unit or clear link to process/producer in that line: sales and costs may accumulate in «no PT unit / unassigned» in the settlement table.
diagnostico.depuracionDesc: — Internal use; do not share as producer result.
diagnostico.depuracionHelp: Dispatches and invoice lines for the period, with the same PT unit → producer resolution as settlement. Use this only to diagnose data; do not confuse with final financial reports.
diagnostico.sinDespachos: None. Check dates or that invoiced dispatches exist.
diagnostico.sinLineas: No lines: settlement is empty because there are no invoice items in period dispatches.

semanticBlock.title: Understand this report
semanticBlock.sinDescripcion: No extended description for this report.

misc.jsonMissingHint: again to fetch data from the backend.
misc.hayFilasSinProductor: There are rows without producer or incomplete. Check
misc.hayFilasSinProductorEnd: below on this screen if the amounts are relevant.
misc.noDetalleOperativo: No operative detail available for this producer in the current response.
misc.packingNocalculadoDesc: (missing rate, unmapped species or incomplete data). The net shown may not include real packing for this producer.
misc.materialesEnCeroDesc: with sales and boxes — check recipes/consumptions or lines without format in the detail.
misc.sinFilasCajasPt: No rows in PT boxes for these filters.
misc.tablaResumidaCajasPt: Summary table — PT boxes by producer
misc.primeras15Filas: First 15 rows from the same generated payload
misc.regenerarSincronizar: You can regenerate data and then sync the snapshot.
misc.facturasDespachos: Invoices and packing lists are generated in Dispatches
misc.reportesGuardadosHint: Load, rename or delete. Save: supervisor/admin · delete: admin.

decision.planificacionDesc: Format, pallets and yield. Does not modify Packed, In cold-storage or Shipped.
decision.variosFormatos: Multiple formats: adjust boxes/pallet and lb/box according to the mix.
decision.bloqueadoTitle: No fruit available to plan offer
decision.bloqueadoDetail: Use «Detail» to enter lbs manually or wait for reception.
decision.parcialDetail: Enter available lbs (or sync with RM) to see the balance.
decision.justoDetail: Balance at zero with current data.
decision.okDetail: {lb} lbs to spare over what is required.
decision.shortDetail: Not enough fruit available to cover the indicated offer.

systemGuide.title: System guide
systemGuide.subtitle: Up-to-date documentation on the data flow, application modules and Reports tabs. Use it to onboard users and validate numbers without mixing daily operations, commercial activity and period financial close.
systemGuide.badgeDoc: Documentation only — does not change calculations
systemGuide.howToUseDesc: Three reading levels: (1) menu modules — where data is entered; (2) Reports tabs — what question each one answers; (3) stage flow — what originates at each step and which reports consume it. On screen, each report block shows its 'source of truth'. The settlement JSON diagnostic and bulk CSV import are admin-only.
systemGuide.sectionModulesDesc: Side menu routes. Data entered here feeds Reports when you generate or refresh the period close.
systemGuide.sectionTabsNote: Operations and Decision use the current operative date; Close and Documents use the period
systemGuide.sectionExportsDesc3: (4-sheet Excel, detail CSV, formal PDF) live in Close. The
systemGuide.sectionExportsDesc5: and operational PDFs are in Documents. Parameter
systemGuide.sectionExportsDesc6: on backend PDFs and exports; UI labels follow the app language.
systemGuide.sectionTraceabilityDesc: How the system assigns each invoice line to a producer (or to 'unassigned'). Matches the diagnostic panel in Close (admin).
